steps: Open Telegram and go to https://t.me/BotFather (or search for @BotFather in Telegram)
Start a chat with BotFather and send the command /newbot
Follow the prompts: provide a display name for your bot (e.g. 'My Assistant Bot')
Provide a username for your bot — must end in 'bot' (e.g. 'myassistant_bot')
BotFather will reply with your bot token in the format 123456789:ABCDefghIJKlmnoPQRstuvwxyz
Copy and save this token securely — it is shown once but can be retrieved via /mybots

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Bot Token
credential_fields.description: The bot token provided by @BotFather. Included in the URL path as /bot{token}/method

notes: Bot creation is completely free with no plan or payment required
The token is embedded in the API URL path, not an HTTP header
To retrieve an existing token, open BotFather and send /mybots, select your bot, then 'API Token'
Revoke a token by sending /revoke to BotFather if it is compromised
Default rate limit is 30 messages per second per bot

test_endpoint.description: Returns basic information about the bot — replace {token} with your actual bot token
